name: Ithil-Violethaven
personality: This spell-capped capybara's ringed eyes miss nothing — its understanding of system design borders on prophetic. Light bends around it slightly — or perhaps that's just the reflection off a passing test run. Ithil-Violethaven writes code that works the same way every single time — boringly, reliably, but other tools relax in its presence; even eslint grows gentle.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
